All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AvatarSize
Size variants for FxAvatar.
ButtonVariant
 
CardVariant
Visual variants for FxCard.
ContainerWidth
Width breakpoints for FxContainer.
Forja
 
ForjaStylesheets
Utility class responsible for registering dynamic CSS strings as temporary stylesheet files for use with JavaFX scene graph nodes.
FxAccordion
A vertical stack of FxCollapse sections.
FxAccordion.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAccordion.
FxAlert
An inline colored notice.
FxAlert.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAlert.
FxAlert.OnDismiss
Callback fired when the alert is dismissed via the × icon.
FxAnchorNav
A vertical list of in-page jump links backed by a ScrollPane + target-node map.
FxAnchorNav.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAnchorNav.
FxAppBar
A top app bar with a leading slot (menu/back), a title, and a trailing action slot.
FxAppBar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAppBar.
FxAreaChart
A styled area chart built on AreaChart.
FxAreaChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAreaChart.
FxAspectRatio
A container that constrains its single child to a fixed width:height ratio.
FxAspectRatio.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAspectRatio.
FxAudioPlayer
A compact audio player — play/pause + seek slider + elapsed/duration.
FxAudioPlayer.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAudioPlayer.
FxAutocomplete<T>
A text input with a suggestion popup — an FxTextField plus a ListView rendered in a Popup anchored below the field.
FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAutocomplete.
FxAutocomplete.OnSelect<T>
Callback fired when a suggestion is chosen.
FxAvatar
A circular avatar that renders an image with an initials fallback.
FxAvatar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAvatar.
FxAvatarGroup
A horizontal stack of overlapping FxAvatars with an optional overflow count.
FxAvatarGroup.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAvatarGroup.
FxBadge
A styled pill-shaped badge built on top of Label.
FxBadge.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBadge.
FxBadgeSkin
Skin for FxBadge.
FxBanner
A full-width top-of-page notice with an optional call-to-action button and a dismiss (×) icon.
FxBanner.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBanner.
FxBarChart
A styled bar chart built on BarChart.
FxBarChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBarChart.
FxBlockquote
A styled blockquote built as a composite VBox.
FxBlockquote.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBlockquote.
FxBottomSheet
A bottom-anchored sliding sheet.
FxBottomSheet.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBottomSheet.
FxBreadcrumbs
A trail of clickable segments separated by /.
FxBreadcrumbs.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBreadcrumbs.
FxBreadcrumbs.OnSelect
Callback fired when a segment is clicked.
FxBulletList
A vertical bullet or numbered list.
FxBulletList.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxBulletList.
FxBulletList.Kind
Marker style for the list.
FxButton
A styled button component build on top of Button.
FxButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxButton.
FxButtonGroup
A single-select segmented control: a row (or column) of FxToggleButton items sharing a ToggleGroup.
FxButtonGroup.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxButtonGroup.
FxButtonSkin
 
FxCalendar
A month-grid calendar with navigation and single-day selection.
FxCalendar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCalendar.
FxCalendar.OnSelect
Callback fired when a date is picked.
FxCard
A surface container with three optional slots — header, body, footer.
FxCard.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCard.
FxCarousel
A single-slide-at-a-time carousel — next/prev icon buttons + dots indicator + optional auto-advance.
FxCarousel.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCarousel.
FxCheckBox
A styled check box built on CheckBox.
FxCheckBox.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCheckBox.
FxCheckGroup
A group of FxCheckBox items with an observable FxCheckGroup.selectedValuesProperty() multi-select model.
FxCheckGroup.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCheckGroup.
FxChip
A styled removable chip built on top of Label.
FxChip.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxChip.
FxChipSkin
Skin for FxChip.
FxCode
A styled inline code span built on top of Label.
FxCode.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCode.
FxCodeEditor
A styled code editor built on RichTextFX CodeArea.
FxCodeEditor.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCodeEditor.
FxCollapse
A single-section collapsible: header + expandable content.
FxCollapse.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCollapse.
FxColorPicker
A styled color picker built on ColorPicker.
FxColorPicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxColorPicker.
FxComboBox<T>
A styled combo box built on ComboBox.
FxComboBox.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxComboBox.
FxCommandPalette
A ⌘K-style command palette — a centered floating input that filters a command list and invokes a callback on select.
FxCommandPalette.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCommandPalette.
FxCommandPalette.Command
A palette command — id, human title, optional icon glyph, optional hint (rendered as FxKeybindingHint), and the action to run when selected.
FxComponentBuilder<T extends javafx.scene.control.Control,B extends FxComponentBuilder<T,B>>
Abstract base builder for all Forja component builders.
FxConfirmDialog
A confirmation dialog — an FxDialog preset with title, message, cancel + confirm buttons, and a boolean callback.
FxConfirmDialog.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxConfirmDialog.
FxContainer
A max-width-capped, centered content container.
FxContainer.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxContainer.
FxContextMenu
A styled context menu built on ContextMenu.
FxContextMenu.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxContextMenu.
FxCopyButton
A button that copies a configured value to the system clipboard on click and briefly flashes a confirmation icon + label.
FxCopyButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxCopyButton.
FxDataGrid<T>
A sortable, filterable, paginated table.
FxDataGrid.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDataGrid.
FxDatePicker
A styled date input with optional leading icon, min/max bounds, helper text, and validation-state variants.
FxDatePicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDatePicker.
FxDateRangePicker
A date-range input — two FxDatePickers with an end ≥ start clamp.
FxDateRangePicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDateRangePicker.
FxDateTimePicker
A composite date-and-time input — a FxDatePicker and a FxTimePicker side by side, exposing a single LocalDateTime value.
FxDateTimePicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDateTimePicker.
FxDescriptionList
A key/value description list rendered as a two-column grid (horizontal) or a stacked pair per row (vertical).
FxDescriptionList.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDescriptionList.
FxDialog
A modal dialog rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.
FxDialog.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDialog.
FxDonutChart
A donut-shaped variant of PieChart.
FxDonutChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDonutChart.
FxDrawer
A side-anchored sliding panel rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.
FxDrawer.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDrawer.
FxDropdownMenu
A styled dropdown-menu button built on MenuButton.
FxDropdownMenu.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxDropdownMenu.
FxEmptyState
A centered "nothing here" panel — icon + heading + description + optional action node.
FxEmptyState.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxEmptyState.
FxErrorState
An error-flavored empty state — wraps FxEmptyState with an alert-triangle icon and the forja-error-state style class so CSS can tint headings + icons red.
FxErrorState.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxErrorState.
FxErrorSummary
An aggregate list of validation errors, framed as a danger-colored panel.
FxErrorSummary.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxErrorSummary.
FxFileChooser
A file-chooser control — a button + label showing the chosen file (or "N files" when multiple).
FxFileChooser.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFileChooser.
FxFileChooser.OnChoose
Callback fired when files are chosen.
FxFileDropzone
A drag-and-drop target for files — a dashed-border VBox with an icon + prompt.
FxFileDropzone.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFileDropzone.
FxFileDropzone.OnDrop
Callback fired when files are dropped.
FxFlex
A wrap-flow layout — a styled FlowPane.
FxFlex.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFlex.
FxFocusTrap
Non-visual utility that traps keyboard focus inside a root node's subtree.
FxFocusTrap.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFocusTrap.
FxForm
A declarative form container: a vertical stack of FxFormFields with an optional FxErrorSummary at the top and helpers to run validation across all fields.
FxForm.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxForm.
FxFormDialog
A dialog preset for form entry — wraps an FxDialog with a body area, cancel button, and a save button whose enabled state is optionally driven by a Supplier validator.
FxFormDialog.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFormDialog.
FxFormDialog.OnSubmit
Callback fired on submit.
FxFormField<T>
A form-field row: label + control + optional error message.
FxFormField.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxFormField.
FxGauge
A speedometer-style gauge — semicircular arc + needle + numeric value label.
FxGauge.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxGauge.
FxGrid
A styled GridPane for aligning children on a two-dimensional grid.
FxGrid.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxGrid.
FxHeatmap
A grid heatmap — rectangular cells colored by value between FxHeatmap.getLowColor() and FxHeatmap.getHighColor().
FxHeatmap.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxHeatmap.
FxHoverCard
A hover-triggered rich card.
FxHoverCard.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxHoverCard.
FxIcon
A styled icon component built on top of Ikonli's FontIcon.
FxIcon.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxIcon.
FxIconButton
A styled icon button built on top of JavaFX Button.
FxIconButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxIconButton.
FxIconButtonSkin
Skin for FxIconButton.
FxImage
A styled ImageView wrapper that shows a spinner while the source image loads and swaps to a fallback icon if loading fails.
FxImage.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxImage.
FxImageCropper
A crop-selection overlay for a source Image.
FxImageCropper.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxImageCropper.
FxImageGallery
A grid of thumbnails that opens a full-screen FxLightbox on click.
FxImageGallery.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxImageGallery.
FxImagePicker
An image picker — a preview FxImage + a "Choose image" button that opens a native FileChooser filtered to image extensions.
FxImagePicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxImagePicker.
FxImagePicker.OnChoose
Callback fired when a file is chosen.
FxJsonEditor
A JSON-flavored FxCodeEditor — wraps a code editor preset with a regex-driven JSON tokenizer that emits CSS classes json-key, json-string, json-number, json-boolean, json-null, json-punctuation.
FxJsonEditor.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxJsonEditor.
FxKanbanBoard
A kanban board — horizontal HBox of vertical columns, each holding a VBox of draggable card nodes.
FxKanbanBoard.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxKanbanBoard.
FxKanbanBoard.OnCardMoved
Callback fired when a card moves between columns.
FxKbd
A styled keyboard-shortcut chip built on top of Label.
FxKbd.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxKbd.
FxKeybindingHint
A row of FxKbd chips separated by a small "+" glyph — a compact way to display a keyboard shortcut like ⌘ + K.
FxKeybindingHint.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxKeybindingHint.
FxLabel
A styled label component built on top of Label.
FxLabel.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxLabel.
FxLabelSkin
Skin for FxLabel.
FxLightbox
A full-scrim media viewer for one or more image URLs.
FxLightbox.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxLightbox.
FxLineChart
A styled line chart built on LineChart.
FxLineChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxLineChart.
FxLink
A styled hyperlink component built on top of Hyperlink.
FxLink.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxLink.
FxLinkSkin
Skin for FxLink.
FxList<T>
A styled list view built on ListView.
FxList.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxList.
FxMarkdownEditor
A split source-editor + rendered-preview markdown editor.
FxMarkdownEditor.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMarkdownEditor.
FxMaskedInput
A text input with a fixed input mask.
FxMaskedInput.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMaskedInput.
FxMasonry
A masonry layout — a Region that packs children into equal-width columns using a greedy "shortest column" algorithm.
FxMasonry.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMasonry.
FxMenuBar
A styled menu bar built on MenuBar.
FxMenuBar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMenuBar.
FxMenuButton
A menu-button preset for icon-only action clusters.
FxMenuButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMenuButton.
FxMiniCalendar
A compact calendar variant — an FxCalendar wrapped in a VBox carrying the extra forja-mini-calendar style class so CSS can shrink cell size, tighten padding, etc.
FxMiniCalendar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMiniCalendar.
FxMultiSelect
A multi-select combo — a summary row + a dropdown popup of checkable items.
FxMultiSelect.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxMultiSelect.
FxNodeBuilder<T extends javafx.scene.Node,B extends FxNodeBuilder<T,B>>
Abstract base builder for Forja component builders whose target is a Node but not a Control.
FxNotificationCenter
A stack of dismissible notifications anchored to a scene corner via the OverlayHost overlay layer.
FxNotificationCenter.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxNotificationCenter.
FxNumberField
A styled numeric input with optional leading icon, prefix/suffix affixes, increment/decrement steppers, and validation-state variants.
FxNumberField.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxNumberField.
FxOTPInput
A one-time-code entry field — a row of length single-character text boxes with auto-advance and paste support.
FxOTPInput.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxOTPInput.
FxOTPInput.OnComplete
Callback fired when all boxes are filled.
FxPagination
A page-number control with previous/next arrows.
FxPagination.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxPagination.
FxPagination.OnPageChange
Callback fired when the current page changes.
FxPasswordField
A styled password input with optional leading icon, helper/error text, and an optional reveal-toggle that swaps to a plain text view.
FxPasswordField.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxPasswordField.
FxPieChart
A styled pie chart built on PieChart.
FxPieChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxPieChart.
FxPopover
A floating panel anchored to a target Node.
FxPopover.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxPopover.
FxPortal
A "render-elsewhere" helper — attaches a target node to the OverlayHost overlay layer of a given Scene whenever FxPortal.isVisible() is true, and removes it when false.
FxPortal.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxPortal.
FxProgressBar
A styled progress bar built on ProgressBar.
FxProgressBar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxProgressBar.
FxProgressCircle
A styled circular progress indicator built on ProgressIndicator.
FxProgressCircle.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxProgressCircle.
FxRadarChart
A radar (spider) chart — polygon-per-series over polar axes.
FxRadarChart.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRadarChart.
FxRadioGroup
A single-select radio group with an observable FxRadioGroup.valueProperty().
FxRadioGroup.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRadioGroup.
FxRangeSlider
A two-thumb range slider — lowValue + highValue.
FxRangeSlider.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRangeSlider.
FxRating
A star-rating input from 0 to FxRating.getMax().
FxRating.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRating.
FxRating.OnChange
Callback fired when the rating changes.
FxResizablePane
A container whose single child can be resized along one edge by dragging a user-visible handle.
FxResizablePane.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxResizablePane.
FxResponsive
A responsive container that swaps its visible child based on the current width and a set of named breakpoints.
FxResponsive.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxResponsive.
FxResultPage
A full-page success or failure summary — large icon + title + description + action row.
FxResultPage.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxResultPage.
FxResultPage.Status
Result status variants.
FxRichTextEditor
A styled rich-text editor built on RichTextFX InlineCssTextArea with a bold/italic/underline toolbar.
FxRichTextEditor.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRichTextEditor.
FxRow
A horizontal layout container with token-driven spacing presets.
FxRow.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxRow.
FxScatterPlot
A styled scatter plot built on ScatterChart.
FxScatterPlot.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxScatterPlot.
FxScrollArea
A styled scroll area — a ScrollPane wrapper.
FxScrollArea.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxScrollArea.
FxScrollSpy
Non-visual controller that tracks which of several registered "section" nodes is currently in view inside a ScrollPane, exposing the active section's key via FxScrollSpy.activeKeyProperty().
FxScrollSpy.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxScrollSpy.
FxSearchField
A search-flavored input: wraps an FxTextField preset with a leading search icon and an optional clear-button that appears while the field has text.
FxSearchField.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSearchField.
FxSearchField.OnSearch
Callback fired when the user presses ENTER on the search field.
FxSearchHighlight
A TextFlow that renders a source string with occurrences of a search query wrapped in bold Text nodes so matches stand out.
FxSearchHighlight.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSearchHighlight.
FxSection
A labeled content section composed of a title, optional leading separator, and arbitrary content children.
FxSection.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSection.
FxSeparator
A styled separator component built on top of Separator.
FxSeparator.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSeparator.
FxSeparatorSkin
Skin for FxSeparator.
FxSidebar
A vertical container for navigation content — a styled VBox with a fixed default width.
FxSidebar.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSidebar.
FxSidebarNav
A vertical list of navigation items with a single-select model.
FxSidebarNav.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSidebarNav.
FxSidebarNav.OnSelect
Callback fired when the active item changes.
FxSkeleton
A shimmer placeholder shape for loading states.
FxSkeleton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSkeleton.
FxSkeleton.Shape
Shape variant options.
FxSlider
A styled numeric range slider with optional value label + prefix/suffix.
FxSlider.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSlider.
FxSpacer
A spacing primitive for HBox / VBox layouts.
FxSpacer.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSpacer.
FxSparkline
A compact inline chart — a polyline drawn on a Canvas sized to fit its parent.
FxSparkline.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSparkline.
FxSplitButton
A split button built on SplitMenuButton — a primary click surface plus a chevron that opens a menu of MenuItems.
FxSplitButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSplitButton.
FxSplitView
A styled resizable split view — a SplitPane wrapper.
FxSplitView.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSplitView.
FxStack
A vertical layout container with token-driven spacing presets.
FxStack.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStack.
FxStat
A KPI card — a compact label / value / optional trend delta stat.
FxStat.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStat.
FxStat.Trend
Trend direction — controls color + arrow icon.
FxStatusDot
A small colored circle used to indicate a discrete status value.
FxStatusDot.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStatusDot.
FxStepper
A horizontal multi-step progress indicator: numbered dots + optional labels connected by lines.
FxStepper.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStepper.
FxStickyHeader
A container that pins its first child (the header) to the top of a host ScrollPane's viewport while the rest of the content scrolls underneath.
FxStickyHeader.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStickyHeader.
FxStyle
An immutable style override object for Forja components.
FxStyleBuilder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxStyle
FxSwitch
A pill-style on/off toggle switch.
FxSwitch.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSwitch.
FxSwitch.OnChange
Callback fired when the switch's selected state changes.
FxTable<T>
A styled table view built on TableView.
FxTable.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTable.
FxTabs
A styled tabbed pane built on TabPane.
FxTabs.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTabs.
FxTagInput
A tag entry field — a wrapping row of FxChip tags plus an inline TextField for adding new ones.
FxTagInput.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTagInput.
FxTagInput.OnChange
Callback fired when the tags list changes.
FxText
A multi-line paragraph text component built on top of Label.
FxText.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxText.
FxTextArea
A styled multi-line text input with validation-state variants and an optional auto-resize behavior.
FxTextArea.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTextArea.
FxTextField
A styled text input with optional leading/trailing icons, helper text, and validation-state variants.
FxTextField.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTextField.
FxTextSkin
Skin for FxText.
FxTheme
 
FxThemeToggle
A button that toggles between FxTheme.LIGHT and FxTheme.DARK on the target Scene via Forja.applyTheme(javafx.scene.Scene, io.forja.FxTheme).
FxThemeToggle.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxThemeToggle.
FxTimeline
A vertical event timeline — colored dot + connector line + title/subtitle card per entry.
FxTimeline.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTimeline.
FxTimeline.Entry
An entry — public for iteration.
FxTimePicker
A styled time input with hour and minute spinners, optional seconds, and an optional 12-hour AM/PM toggle.
FxTimePicker.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTimePicker.
FxToast
A transient bottom-right notification rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.
FxToast.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxToast.
FxToggleButton
A stateful toggle button built on ToggleButton.
FxToggleButton.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxToggleButton.
FxTooltip
A styled tooltip built on Tooltip.
FxTooltip.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTooltip.
FxTree<T>
A styled tree view built on TreeView.
FxTree.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTree.
FxTreeTable<T>
A styled tree-table view built on TreeTableView.
FxTreeTable.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxTreeTable.
FxValidator<T>
A sequential rule engine for validating a single value against a chain of Rules.
FxValidator.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxValidator.
FxVerticalTabs
A vertical (LEFT-side) tabbed pane built on TabPane.
FxVerticalTabs.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxVerticalTabs.
FxVideoPlayer
A styled video player — MediaView + play/pause, seek slider, and elapsed/duration label.
FxVideoPlayer.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxVideoPlayer.
FxVirtualList<T>
A lightweight virtual list — renders only the visible slice of a large ObservableList into a scrollable viewport.
FxVirtualList.Builder<T>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxVirtualList.
FxWaveform
A waveform display for PCM audio.
FxWaveform.Builder
Fluent builder for constructing an FxWaveform.
IconPosition
Icon placement options for FxIconButton.
InputVariant
Shared validation-state variants for Forja form inputs.
LabelVariant
Typography variants for FxLabel.
LinkVariant
Visual variants for FxLink.
OverlayHost
Per-Scene overlay layer for Forja overlays (toasts, popovers, dialogs).
Rule<T>
A validation rule — takes a candidate value, returns either null (valid) or an error message.
SemanticVariant
The shared semantic color palette used by Forja components.
SeparatorVariant
Thickness variants for FxSeparator.
SpacingSize
Token-driven spacing presets shared by Forja layout primitives.
TextVariant
Paragraph variants for FxText.
